examples: She studied for four years at the Academy of Eurythmy in Munich , where she received her Diploma.
In 1985 she moved to Australia, taught for five years at the Rudolf Steiner School in Melbourne and worked as a Eurythmy Therapist in the Anthroposophical Clinic for Cancer patients.
In February 2008, Birgith created a Stage Group of professional Eurythmists, "the Southern Light" with the intention of bringing eurythmy performances to a wider audience, in Australia and beyond.
